markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Standardize Airtable workflows and delegate new responsibilities.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Airtable Standardization:** Implement a standard Airtable setup across all clients by next Wednesday. This includes new columns (e.g., `Week`, `Sent to Client`) and automations to streamline reporting and improve visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**New Responsibilities:** Team members will now own their clients' content calendars and contribute 2-week production recaps to client agendas, freeing up Engagement Manager time.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [**"Anything" Content Strategy:** For the "Anything" client, prioritize speed over perfection. A "good enough" standard is acceptable because the client does not review articles before publication.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)

## Topics

### Airtable Standardization

  - [**Goal:** Create a consistent Airtable structure across all clients to simplify reporting and enable future automation of tasks like Monday updates.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Required Columns:**](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [`Content Calendar`: A single-select field to manage the weekly content pipeline (e.g., `Current Week`, `1 Week Out`).](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [`Week`: A number field to track the week of the engagement (e.g., `Week 20`).](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
          - [**Action:** Backdate this column for all content published since January 1st.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [`Sent to Client`: A date field (US time zone) that will be populated by an automation.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [`Current Date`: A hidden formula field (`NOW()`) that triggers the `Sent to Client` automation.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [`In Looker`: A checkbox to confirm URLs have been added to Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
          - [**Why:** Ensures performance data is current and enables seamless handoffs during OOO periods.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [**Optional (for clients with approval workflows):**](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
          - [`Topic Approval`: Single-select field for client feedback (e.g., `Approved`, `Needs Revision`).](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
          - [`Topic Feedback`: Long-text field for client notes.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
          - [`Article Approval`: Single-select field for client review status.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [**View Customization:**](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
      - [Team members have full ownership to create personal views that suit their workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
      - [**Caution:** Do not modify client-facing views.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
      - [**Recommendation:** Use the Udemy Airtable as a reference for the new setup.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

### New Responsibilities & Automation

  - [**Content Calendar Ownership:**](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - [Team members will now own their clients' content calendars.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - [**Weekly Task:** Select new assignments for the `4 Weeks Out` bucket.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
      - [**Why:** Provides a clear runway for content planning, enabling proactive keyword research and strategy discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [**Content Calendar Automation:**](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [A weekly automation (runs Saturdays at midnight PT) will shift content through the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [**Execution Order:** Must run in a specific sequence to prevent errors.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
        1.  `4 Weeks Out` → `3 Weeks Out`
        2.  `3 Weeks Out` → `2 Weeks Out`
        3.  `2 Weeks Out` → `1 Week Out`
        4.  `1 Week Out` → `Current Week`
        5.  `Current Week` → `Shared with Client`
  - [**"Sent to Client" Automation:**](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [This automation populates the `Sent to Client` date field, providing a clear delivery timestamp for reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [**Trigger:** Varies by client workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
          - [**Review Process:** Triggered when status changes to `Ready for Client Review`.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
          - [**Auto-Publish:** Triggered when status changes to `Published`.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [**Client Agenda Recaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
      - [Team members will contribute a 2-week production recap to each client's agenda.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
      - [**Why:** Provides clients with a summary of recent work and allows for flagging specific articles for discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
      - [**Deadline:** 12 hours before the client meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

### "Anything" Content Production

  - [**Strategy:** Prioritize speed and volume over perfection to meet the client's scaling goals.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The client does not review articles before publication, making a "good enough" standard acceptable.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [**Minimum Quality Bar:**](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
      - [Correct headers (sentence case).](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
      - [Accurate CTA placement.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
      - [Quick fact-check for glaring errors.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
      - [No absurd jargon.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

  - [**Simran:**](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [Implement the standard Airtable setup for Udemy and Understory by next Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)

      - [Create a Loom video detailing the content calendar automation sequence.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Complete Monday updates by EOD Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Contribute 2-week production recaps to client agendas at least 12 hours before meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/gq_5EXc_sGy9MYa-W48Job1kzjiKq7EW?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
